title: clutia richardiana var. pubescens
intro: Clutia richardiana var. pubescens, also known as a shrub or small tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Clusiaceae. The leaves and bark of Clutia richardiana var. pubescens have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. Clutia richardiana var. pubescens is traditionally prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
